About EduErpee Technology

Transforming Businesses Through Smart Technology Solutions

A trusted IT partner delivering innovative software solutions across USA, EU, and India for over a decade.

EduErpee Technology Private Limited is a full-service IT solutions provider specializing in custom ERP systems, enterprise software, mobile applications, and digital transformation. Founded with a vision to simplify business operations through technology, we've grown into a trusted partner for 100+ organizations across education, healthcare, retail, and enterprise sectors.

We combine deep technical expertise with a genuine understanding of business challenges to deliver solutions that don't just work—they transform how you operate, scale, and succeed.

🎯

Our Mission

To empower businesses with affordable, scalable technology solutions that simplify operations, automate workflows, and drive measurable growth.

🚀

Our Vision

To be the most trusted IT partner for SMEs worldwide, known for delivering enterprise-grade solutions at accessible pricing with exceptional support.

⭐

Our Values

Customer-first approach, transparent pricing, quality over shortcuts, continuous innovation, and unwavering commitment to your success.

What We Do Best

🏢 Enterprise Solutions

We build comprehensive ERP systems tailored to your industry—school management, inventory control, library systems, healthcare management, and custom business automation platforms that scale with your growth.

💻 Software Development

From responsive websites to complex web applications, we create digital experiences that engage users and drive results. Our full-stack development team handles everything from concept to deployment.

📱 Mobile Applications

Native Android and iOS apps, cross-platform solutions using Flutter and React Native, all seamlessly integrated with your backend systems for unified data access.

☁️ Cloud & DevOps

Secure cloud hosting, automated deployments, continuous integration pipelines, and 99.9% uptime SLAs. We handle the infrastructure so you can focus on your business.

🎨 UI/UX Design

User-centered design that looks premium and feels intuitive. Every interface we create is tested for usability, accessibility, and conversion optimization.

📈 Digital Marketing

SEO, social media management, PPC campaigns, and content marketing strategies that get you found online and convert visitors into customers.

Technology Stack

Industry-proven technologies selected for performance, security, and long-term maintainability.

Ready-to-Deploy Products

Software That Solves Your Specific Problem

Stop paying for features you don't need. Every product is built for real Indian businesses and can be fully customised to match exactly how you operate.

School ERP
🏫
School Management System

Run your entire school from one dashboard — admissions to results, fees to parent communication, payroll to library. Android app companion included.

Admissions Attendance Fee Mgmt Exams Parent Portal

Inventory ERP
📦
Inventory Management

Real-time stock tracking, automated purchase orders, low-stock alerts, vendor management, and business reports — all running automatically.

Stock TrackingPO ManagementVendorsReports
Book Free Demo →
Library ERP
📚
Library Management

Digitise your library in days. Barcode scanning, catalogue management, issue/return tracking, member management, and automated fine collection.

CatalogueBarcodeIssue/ReturnFines
Book Free Demo →
Transport ERP
🚌
Transportation Management

GPS live tracking, optimised route planning, driver management, fee collection, and automated parent SMS notifications — one integrated system.

GPS TrackingRoute PlanningDriver MgmtNotifications

🏥
Doctor Clinic Software

Complete OPD management — patient records, appointments, EMR, prescriptions, billing, and medicine inventory, all in one dedicated software.

Simple Process

From First Call to Go-Live in 5 Steps

We manage everything from start to finish — you just run your business. Here's exactly what happens when you partner with us.

1
Free Site Visit

We come to you, understand your exact requirements, and assess your needs — completely free, no commitment.

2
Design & Quote

A custom proposal with a fully transparent quote. No hidden charges, no surprises — ever.

3
You Choose

Pick your features, configurations, and integrations. We build it exactly the way you want it.

4
We Build & Deploy

Our expert team builds and deploys your system with precision — minimal disruption to your operations.

5
Train & Support

Full staff training, a complete walkthrough, and dedicated 24/7 support long after go-live.

Why 100+ Businesses Choose Us

We Work Like Your Partner,
Not Just a Vendor

We're local to UP — we speak your language, understand your market, and our team can visit your site in person whenever you need us.

01
Affordable Without Cutting Corners
Enterprise-grade software at prices that make sense for Indian SMEs, schools, and hospitals. No bloatware, only what you need.
02
Built for India, GST-Compliant
Hindi & English interface, GST billing, UPI payment support, and all local compliance built-in from day one.
03
Fast Setup — Live in Days, Not Months
Most clients go live within days. We handle setup, data migration, training, and onboarding — you just show up.
04
Local Offices — Real In-Person Support
Branches in Azamgarh, Greater Noida & Mau. When you need us on-site, we come to you — not just a helpline.
Everything Included. No Surprises.

Over 80% of our clients stay with us for 2+ years — not because they're locked in, but because we keep delivering value long after the project is completed.

✓
Free site visit & consultation before you pay a rupee
✓
Android companion app included with every ERP product
✓
Cloud & on-premise deployment — you choose what's best
✓
100% customisable to your exact workflows & processes
✓
Transparent pricing — no hidden charges, ever
✓
Full staff training & dedicated ongoing support

BDM
